basic_details.short_information: The table below summarizes the key details of the NFSU Software Technical Consultant Recruitment 2026 notice.

application_fee.details: The official notice does not mention any application fee for NFSU Software Technical Consultant Recruitment 2026. Since selection is through walk-in interview, no fee details have been specified.

qualification.details: Candidates applying for NFSU Software Technical Consultant Recruitment 2026 must meet the following educational qualification and experience requirements. | Candidates must hold one of the following essential qualifications: | B.E./B.Tech./M.E./M.Tech. in Computer Science, Information Technology, Electronics & Communication, GIS, Geoinformatics, Artificial Intelligence, Defence Technology, or an equivalent discipline from a recognized University/Institute. OR MCA/M.Sc. (Computer Science/GIS/Geoinformatics/Artificial Intelligence/Data Science/Remote Sensing) with relevant professional experience. | The essential experience requirements are: | Minimum 8 years of post-qualification experience in software development, enterprise GIS integration, modelling & simulation, defence applications, or command and control systems. Experience in software architecture, enterprise application integration, and system deployment. Experience in managing multidisciplinary software development teams and coordinating with stakeholders. Experience in API integration, client-server architecture, web technologies, and enterprise software solutions. | Preference will be given to candidates who additionally have: | Experience in Defence, Armed Forces, DRDO, DPSUs, Government Strategic Projects, Aerospace, or National Security Projects. Prior experience in Wargaming, Mission Planning Systems, Command & Control Systems, Defence Simulation, Digital Twin, Battlefield Management Systems, or Operational Decision Support Systems. Hands-on experience with LuciadLightspeed, LuciadRIA, LuciadFusion, Hexagon GIS Enterprise, ArcGIS Enterprise, CARPET, EXDAM, or equivalent enterprise GIS and simulation platforms. Experience integrating GIS, Radar, Sensors, Tactical Data, Terrain Databases, Weather Systems, Weapon Models, and Operational Analysis Systems. Knowledge of Military Standards, Defence Software Development Life Cycle (SDLC), Systems Engineering, and the Defence Procurement Environment. Experience in international or multinational defence software projects. Knowledge of C++, Java, C#, Python, REST APIs, PostgreSQL/PostGIS, and enterprise databases.

salary_details.details: The selected candidate for the Software Technical Consultant post will receive a consolidated professional service charge of ₹1,30,000 per month. This is a fixed monthly rate and the notice does not indicate any additional allowances.

selection_process: Selection for the NFSU Software Technical Consultant post will be through a Walk-In Interview
which may include a Technical Assessment followed by a Personal Interview
as decided by the Selection Committee.
how_to_apply: There is no separate online or offline application form for this post. Candidates must directly attend the walk-in interview:
Reach the NFSU Gandhinagar Campus, Police Bhavan Rd, Sector 9, Gandhinagar, Gujarat 382007, on 23 July 2026 at 11:00 hours onwards.
Carry an updated resume along with certificates supporting educational qualification and work experience.
Appear for the Technical Assessment and/or Personal Interview as conducted by the Selection Committee.
Note: No invitation emails will be sent for the interview, so candidates must attend on the specified date and time on their own.
important_instructions: No invitation emails will be sent for appearing in the interview. The post is purely temporary and commensurate with the project. The engagement will initially be for one year, extendable based on project requirements and performance. The selected candidate may be required to travel within India and abroad for project-related activities. No TA/DA will be provided for attending the interview process. The University reserves the right to modify, cancel, or withdraw the recruitment process at any stage without assigning any reason.

content_sections.heading: NFSU Software Technical Consultant Recruitment 2026 Notification
content_sections.text: NFSU Software Technical Consultant Recruitment 2026 is a good opportunity for experienced software and GIS professionals interested in working on a defence-linked international project at the Centre for Futuristic Defence Studies, NFSU Gandhinagar. Download NFSU Software Technical Consultant Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: NFSU Software Technical Consultant Recruitment 2026 Overview
content_sections.text: The table below summarizes the key details of the NFSU Software Technical Consultant Recruitment 2026 notice.

rows.details: Software Technical Consultant – Enterprise GIS, Modelling & Simulation Integration
Wargaming Simulator System (WGS) Project – Embassy of India, Algeria
Centre for Futuristic Defence Studies (CFDS), NFSU Gandhinagar (with travel within India and overseas, if required)
NFSU Gandhinagar Campus, Police Bhavan Rd, Sector 9, Gandhinagar, Gujarat 382007

content_sections.heading: Important Dates NFSU Software Technical Consultant Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: The official notice does not mention a separate online application deadline, since selection is conducted directly through the walk-in interview. No invitation emails will be sent to candidates.

content_sections.heading: NFSU Software Technical Consultant Recruitment 2026 Vacancy Details

rows.post_name: Software Technical Consultant – Enterprise GIS, Modelling & Simulation Integration

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria NFSU Software Technical Consultant Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Candidates applying for NFSU Software Technical Consultant Recruitment 2026 must meet the following educational qualification and experience requirements. Candidates must hold one of the following essential qualifications: B.E./B.Tech./M.E./M.Tech. in Computer Science, Information Technology, Electronics & Communication, GIS, Geoinformatics, Artificial Intelligence, Defence Technology, or an equivalent discipline from a recognized University/Institute. OR MCA/M.Sc. (Computer Science/GIS/Geoinformatics/Artificial Intelligence/Data Science/Remote Sensing) with relevant professional experience. The essential experience requirements are: Minimum 8 years of post-qualification experience in software development, enterprise GIS integration, modelling & simulation, defence applications, or command and control systems. Experience in software architecture, enterprise application integration, and system deployment. Experience in managing multidisciplinary software development teams and coordinating with stakeholders. Experience in API integration, client-server architecture, web technologies, and enterprise software solutions. Preference will be given to candidates who additionally have: Experience in Defence, Armed Forces, DRDO, DPSUs, Government Strategic Projects, Aerospace, or National Security Projects. Prior experience in Wargaming, Mission Planning Systems, Command & Control Systems, Defence Simulation, Digital Twin, Battlefield Management Systems, or Operational Decision Support Systems. Hands-on experience with LuciadLightspeed, LuciadRIA, LuciadFusion, Hexagon GIS Enterprise, ArcGIS Enterprise, CARPET, EXDAM, or equivalent enterprise GIS and simulation platforms. Experience integrating GIS, Radar, Sensors, Tactical Data, Terrain Databases, Weather Systems, Weapon Models, and Operational Analysis Systems. Knowledge of Military Standards, Defence Software Development Life Cycle (SDLC), Systems Engineering, and the Defence Procurement Environment. Experience in international or multinational defence software projects. Knowledge of C++, Java, C#, Python, REST APIs, PostgreSQL/PostGIS, and enterprise databases.

content_sections.heading: NFSU Software Technical Consultant Recruitment 2026 Salary / Remuneration
content_sections.text: The selected candidate for the Software Technical Consultant post will receive a consolidated professional service charge of ₹1,30,000 per month. This is a fixed monthly rate and the notice does not indicate any additional allowances.

content_sections.heading: NFSU Software Technical Consultant Recruitment 2026 Application Fee
content_sections.text: The official notice does not mention any application fee for NFSU Software Technical Consultant Recruitment 2026. Since selection is through walk-in interview, no fee details have been specified.

content_sections.heading: NFSU Software Technical Consultant Recruitment 2026 Roles & Responsibilities
content_sections.text: The selected Software Technical Consultant will be responsible for: Monitoring the technical progress of software development and enterprise GIS integration under the WGS Project. Assisting the Project Team Lead in reviewing software architecture, module design, interfaces, APIs, and overall system integration. Coordinating with CFDS developers, OEMs, software vendors, domain experts, and the Industry Partner. Reviewing configuration, deployment, and integration of enterprise GIS desktop, web, and server platforms. Supporting integration of modelling & simulation engines with GIS and operational workflows. Monitoring integration of radar, sensor, explosion, damage assessment, weapon effectiveness, and operational analysis modules. Assisting in software testing, verification, validation, user acceptance testing, and deployment. Reviewing technical documentation, system specifications, and software deliverables. Providing technical guidance during project execution and overseas deployment, wherever required. Performing any other project-related technical responsibilities assigned by the Project Team Lead.

content_sections.heading: NFSU Software Technical Consultant Recruitment 2026 Selection Process
content_sections.text: Selection for the NFSU Software Technical Consultant post will be through a Walk-In Interview, which may include a Technical Assessment followed by a Personal Interview, as decided by the Selection Committee.

content_sections.heading: Documents to Carry NFSU Software Technical Consultant Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: The official notice does not list specific documents for the walk-in interview. As is standard practice for walk-in interviews of this nature, candidates should be prepared with an updated resume, educational certificates, proof of relevant work experience, and a valid photo ID, though candidates are advised to confirm exact document requirements directly with CFDS, NFSU before attending.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply / Attend the Walk-In Interview
content_sections.text: There is no separate online or offline application form for this post. Candidates must directly attend the walk-in interview: Reach the NFSU Gandhinagar Campus, Police Bhavan Rd, Sector 9, Gandhinagar, Gujarat 382007, on 23 July 2026 at 11:00 hours onwards. Carry an updated resume along with certificates supporting educational qualification and work experience. Appear for the Technical Assessment and/or Personal Interview as conducted by the Selection Committee. Note: No invitation emails will be sent for the interview, so candidates must attend on the specified date and time on their own.

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions
content_sections.text: No invitation emails will be sent for appearing in the interview. The post is purely temporary and commensurate with the project. The engagement will initially be for one year, extendable based on project requirements and performance. The selected candidate may be required to travel within India and abroad for project-related activities. No TA/DA will be provided for attending the interview process. The University reserves the right to modify, cancel, or withdraw the recruitment process at any stage without assigning any reason.

faq.question: Q1. What is NFSU Software Technical Consultant Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: It is a recruitment notice issued by the Centre for Futuristic Defence Studies (CFDS), NFSU Gandhinagar, to hire one Software Technical Consultant on a contractual basis for the Wargaming Simulator System (WGS) Project for the Embassy of India, Algeria.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary for the NFSU Software Technical Consultant post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated professional service charge of ₹1,30,000 per month.

faq.question: Q3. When is the NFSU walk-in interview for the CFDS Project?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview is scheduled for 23 July 2026 at 11:00 hours onwards at the NFSU Gandhinagar Campus, Police Bhavan Rd, Sector 9, Gandhinagar, Gujarat 382007.

faq.question: Q4. What is the eligibility for the NFSU Software Technical Consultant post?
faq.answer: Candidates need a B.E./B.Tech./M.E./M.Tech. in Computer Science, IT, Electronics & Communication, GIS, Geoinformatics, AI, Defence Technology, or an equivalent discipline (or an MCA/M.Sc. in a related field), along with a minimum of 8 years of post-qualification experience in software development, enterprise GIS integration, modelling & simulation, or defence/command-and-control systems.

faq.question: Q5. Is there an application fee for NFSU CFDS recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notice does not specify any application fee. This information is currently unavailable in the notification.

faq.question: Q6. Is prior invitation required to attend the interview?
faq.answer: No. The notice clearly states that no invitation emails will be sent, so eligible candidates should attend the walk-in interview directly on the specified date and time.
